macro.title: ICE’s Courtenay Dunn outlines deregulatory housing priorities
macro.what: ICE’s Courtenay Dunn said Trump priorities include deregulation, cost cuts, credit score modernization and fintech rules.
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: Fed holds rates in Powell’s final meeting as chair
macro.what: The Federal Reserve held its benchmark interest rate steady at a target range of 3.5% to 3.75% on Wednesday, marking its third consecutive pause.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Warsh moves to closer to Fed chair confirmation, advancing in Senate committee vote
macro.what: The Senate Banking Committee advanced Kevin Warsh 13-11 for Fed chair, with a full Senate vote possible before Jerome Powell's term expires.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Castlelake, Redwood form $8B prime jumbo mortgage joint venture
housing.what: Castlelake and Redwood Trust have formed a joint venture to purchase up to $8 billion of prime jumbo mortgage loans, the companies announced Tuesday.

housing.title: The Reveal in NYC: This ‘One-of-a-Kind’ Apartment Just Off City Hall Park is Now Listed for $2.2 Million
housing.what: Surrounded by the hustle and bustle of Lower Manhattan, this two-bedroom, two-and-a-half-bathroom loft-style apartment is listed for $2,199,000
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Coming Soon in New Jersey: This 3-Bedroom, 2-Bath Fixer-Upper Less Than an Hour From NYC is Set to Hit the Market This Week
housing.what: Just under an hour drive away from New York City, this Woodbridge, New Jersey 1,121-square-foot house is set to hit the market this week with a list price of $499,000
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: Fannie Mae trims expenses, posts $3.7B profit in Q1 2026
notables.what: Fannie Mae earned $3.7B in Q1 2026 on $7.3B in revenue, with expenses down 19% and net worth rising to $112.7B.
